##NAMES=Lorenzenite
##RRUFFID=R130051
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Na_2_Ti_2_O_3_(Si_2_O_6_)
##LOCALITY=Mont Saint-Hilaire, Rouville RCM, Monteregie, Quebec, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Don Doell
##DESCRIPTION=A jumbled mass of colorless hair-like crystals associated with black arfvedsonite and white microcline
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130051
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.711 b: 5.232 c: 14.503 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 661 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
